name: text1
text:
Welcome to TrayBuddy!
Next, I'll give you a brief introduction to this app.

name: text2
text: TrayBuddy is a highly customizable desktop pet app.

name: text3
text: You can quickly switch Mods from the right-click menu to use all kinds of custom desktop pets.

name: text4
text:
Desktop pets support custom animations, voice, and text.
They also support various interactions like mouse clicks and keyboard shortcuts.

name: text5
text: You can design your own desktop pet and define a dedicated chain of interactions and dialogue events.

name: text6
text: This program provides comprehensive tools for creating custom Mods.

name: text7
text: You can start with the built-in Mods to see what this app can do.

name: text8
text: Whether you're doing fan creations, making an OC, or just memeing around, TrayBuddy can meet your needs.

name: text9
text: We'll keep improving to bring everyone a better experience.

name: text10
text: Next, we plan to launch on Steam as a free app and make use of the Steam Workshop community.

name: text12
text: We sincerely thank every user of TrayBuddy.

name: text13
text: Finally, we hope this app can truly bring you joy.
